name: Arvist
description: Arvist supercharges warehouse operations around quality control and compliance by utilizing current infrastructure such as security cameras, cell phone cameras, and WMS data. With the assistance of Arvist AI, warehouses can guarantee the accuracy of products during shipping and receiving, detect damages in real-time, minimize chargebacks, while improving safety, compliance and warehouse throughput with the aim of achieving a Perfect Order Index (POI) of over 99.99%.
program: Techstars Industries of the Future Accelerator

extra.brief_description: Arvist supercharges warehouse operations around quality control and compliance by utilizing current infrastructure such as security cameras, cell phone cameras, and WMS data. name: HyperTunnel
description: HyperTunnel is a secure mixed-reality platform that connects frontline technicians with remote experts for real-time visual guidance. Using tablets or headsets, both users see the same equipment, place 3D annotations, and walk through procedures together. The system creates a live digital twin of the workspace, enabling experts to guide actions remotely while AI tools help reduce errors, document work, and convert sessions into training modules.
location: Jersey City, New Jersey, United States
program: Techstars Industries of the Future Accelerator
